name: UniqueGift
description: This object describes a unique gift that was upgraded from a regular gift.

fields.name: gift_id
fields.description: Identifier of the regular gift from which the gift was upgraded

fields.name: base_name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the regular gift from which this unique gift was upgraded

fields.name: name
fields.description: Unique name of the gift. This name can be used in https://t.me/nft/... links and story areas.

fields.name: number
fields.description: Unique number of the upgraded gift among gifts upgraded from the same regular gift

fields.name: is_premium
fields.description: True, if the original regular gift was exclusively purchaseable by Telegram Premium subscribers

fields.name: is_burned
fields.description: True, if the gift was used to craft another gift and isn't available anymore

fields.name: is_from_blockchain
fields.description: True, if the gift is assigned from the TON blockchain and can't be resold or transferred in Telegram

fields.name: colors
fields.description: The color scheme that can be used by the gift's owner for the chat's name, replies to messages and link previews; for business account gifts and gifts that are currently on sale only

fields.name: publisher_chat
fields.description: Information about the chat that published the gift
